title: Host Genetic Regulation of NLRP3 Inflammasome Cytokines Reveals Immune and Vascular Pathways in HIV.
publicationName: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
journalName: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
snippet: People with HIV exhibit elevated inflammation and cardiovascular risk despite antiretroviral therapy. To define the genetic architecture of inflammasome-associated inflammation, we performed whole-genome sequencing and quantified plasma IL-6, IL-1β, and IL-18 in 1,000 ART-suppressed PWH from the U.S. Military HIV Natural History Study.
